item.title: 苹果官宣新 CEO，John Ternus 九月接任
item.guid: 苹果官宣新-CEO，John-Ternus-九月接任
item.description:
Early this morning, Apple officially announced that Tim Cook will step down as CEO, with John Ternus taking over. Simultaneously, two internal letters were leaked, one from current CEO Tim Cook and the other from John Ternus. 今天凌晨，苹果官宣库克将卸任 CEO，由约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 接手。同期，两封内部信流出，一封来自现任 CEO Tim Cook，另一封来自 John Ternus。

In the letter, Cook stated that he would step down as CEO and transition to Chairman within this year. He had multiple in-depth conversations with Ternus and found him to possess vision and outstanding character. 库克在信中表示，自己将在今年内卸任 CEO 并转任董事长。他与特努斯深谈多次，发现他具有远见和卓越人格。

John is the right leader to help us move into the future and forge bold new directions.

Cook confirmed that he would continue as CEO this summer and complete the handover with Ternus in September; Ternus also confirmed in his letter that he would take over as CEO in September. 库克确认将在今年夏天继续担任 CEO，并在 9 月与特努斯完成交接；特努斯在信中同样确认了自己将会在今年 9 月接任 CEO。

This September, I will become Apple's new CEO. It has been a tremendous honor to lead the hardware engineering team, participate in such outstanding work, and personally witness each of you striving to do your best for our users. I look forward to working closely with you in this new role, and of course, I will continue to be hands-on and deeply involved.

Effective today, Ternus will step down as head of hardware engineering, with Tom Marieb taking over and reporting to Johny Srouji. Additionally, Apple announced that Srouji will assume the newly created position of Chief Hardware Officer. 从今天起，特努斯将卸任硬件工程负责人，由 Tom Marieb 接手，汇报给 Johny Srouji。并且，苹果还宣布了 Srouji 将担任新设立的首席硬件官职位 (Chief Hardware Officer)。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Apple officially announced its new CEO; Cook's successor is more like Jobs 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，苹果官宣新CEO，库克接班人更像乔布斯

item.title: 华为发布大阔折叠 Pura X Max 和 Pura 90 系列，余承东：以后扛不住可能涨价
item.guid: 华为发布大阔折叠-Pura-X-Max-和-Pura-90-系列，余承东：以后扛不住可能涨价
item.description:
Yesterday, Huawei officially launched the Pura 90 series and its first large-format foldable screen, the Pura X Max, at the Pura Series and All-Scenario New Product Launch Event. The entire Pura 90 series features a flat-screen design, focusing on imaging upgrades; the Pura X Max, on the other hand, boasts a large-sized wide foldable screen as its selling point, positioned as a flagship foldable form factor. First, let's look at the prices: 昨天，华为在 Pura 系列及全场景新品发布会上正式发布了 Pura 90 系列及首款大阔折叠屏 Pura X Max。Pura 90 全系采用直屏设计，主打影像升级；Pura X Max 则以大尺寸阔折叠屏为卖点，定位旗舰折叠形态。先看价格：

The Pura 90 series starts at 4699 yuan, on par with the previous generation Pura 80 series, while the Pura 90 Pro's starting price is 1000 yuan lower than the Pura 80 Pro; the Pura X Max starts at 10999 yuan.

Richard Yu, Huawei's Executive Director and CEO of Consumer Business Group, stated at the launch event that due to the continuous rise in storage chip prices, the average cost of a single Pura 90 series device has increased by approximately 1500 yuan, leading to significant pricing pressure. 华为常务董事、终端 BG 董事长余承东在发布会上表示，受存储芯片价格持续攀升影响，Pura 90 系列单机平均成本上涨约 1500 元，定价压力显著。

We are under immense pressure and have truly worked very hard. The pricing pressure for new phones is currently very high, and if costs become unsustainable later on, prices may increase.

    The Pura 90 Standard Edition is equipped with Kirin 9010S, featuring a rear 50MP f/1.8 main camera + 50MP f/2.2 periscope telephoto + 12.5MP ultra-wide-angle + Red Maple lens, and a front 50MP camera; it has a built-in 6500mAh battery, supporting 100W wired fast charging and 50W wireless fast charging;

    The Pura X Max is positioned as the industry's first large-format foldable screen phone, with all models equipped with Kirin 9030 Pro; its design inspiration comes from the golden ratio of A4 paper, emphasizing an "expansive inside and out, immersive horizontally and vertically" audio-visual, gaming, and office experience;

    The Pura 90 Pro and Pro Max simultaneously debut with Kirin 9030S, a 50MP main camera equipped with a 10-stop variable aperture from f/1.4-f/4.0, a built-in 6000mAh battery, supporting 66W wired fast charging and 50W wireless fast charging;

    The Pro Max version further enhances imaging specifications, upgrading the telephoto lens from the Pro version to the industry's first ultra-large 200-megapixel RYYB sensor, supporting 20x optical HD video recording and CIPA 7.0 stabilization; the screen is upgraded to 6.9 inches, featuring the debut of anti-reflective and scratch-resistant Kunlun Glass, reducing reflections by 70%; it supports 100W wired + 80W wireless fast charging.

Also released at this event were Huawei AI Glasses, starting at 2499 yuan; MateBook 14 HarmonyOS Edition, starting at 6599 yuan; Huawei Watch FIT 5 Pro, starting at 2099 yuan; Huawei Watch Buds 2, starting at 3488 yuan; and Huawei Watch Ultimate Design, priced at 29999 yuan. 本场发布会一起发布的还有华为 AI 眼镜，售价 2499 元起；MateBook 14 鸿蒙版，6599 元起；华为 Watch FIT 5 Pro，2099 元起；华为 Watch Buds 2，3488 元起；华为 Watch 非凡大师，售价 29999 元。

item.title: 重押 AI，字节跳动去年净利润同比缩水逾七成，高管：没那么大幅度
item.guid: 重押-AI，字节跳动去年净利润同比缩水逾七成，高管：没那么大幅度
item.description:
According to Jiemian News and 21st Century Business Herald, sources reveal that ByteDance's net profit in 2025 will decline by over 70% year-on-year, with a significant contraction in net profit margin. 据界面新闻、21 世纪经济报道消息，知情人士透露，字节跳动 2025 年净利润同比下滑幅度超过 70%，净利润率出现显著收缩。

The core reason is that the company significantly increased its resource investment in artificial intelligence during the third and fourth quarters of last year, including the procurement of high-end AI chips, the development of foundational models, and other key areas. These massive expenditures directly impacted the full year's profitability. 核心原因在于：公司在去年三、四季度大幅加码人工智能领域的资源投入，包括高端 AI 芯片采购、底层模型研发等多个核心环节，巨额开支直接拖累了全年盈利表现。

Despite the significant decline in net profit, ByteDance's revenue side maintained strong growth. According to sources, ByteDance's overall revenue continued to grow last year, with domestic revenue increasing by approximately 20% year-on-year, and overseas revenue growing by nearly 50%. The proportion of overseas business revenue increased from 25% in 2024 to over 30%, reaching a new historical high. 在净利润大幅下滑的背景下，字节跳动的营收端依然保持强劲增长。据知情人士透露，去年字节跳动整体营收延续增长态势，国内营收同比增幅约 20%，海外营收同比增长近 50%，海外业务营收占比从 2024 年的 25% 提升至三成以上，创下历史新高。

Regarding the pace of future investments, ByteDance revealed in communications with shareholders that technological resource investment will further expand this year, coupled with compliance-related supporting investments in overseas markets, meaning short-term net profit margins will continue to face pressure. 对于未来的投入节奏，字节跳动在与股东的沟通中透露，今年技术资源投入将进一步扩大，叠加海外市场合规相关的配套投入，短期净利润率仍将继续承压。

In response, ByteDance executive Li Liang clarified in a post that the aforementioned net profit decline of over 70% was calculated using international accounting standards. Besides increased investment in emerging businesses, it also included factors like changes in preferred stock and option costs, which 'do not reflect the substance of operations'. 对此，字节跳动高管李亮发文澄清，上述超 70% 的净利润降幅采用国际会计准则口径，除新兴业务投入增大外，还包含优先股和期权成本变动等「不反映运营实质」的因素。

He stated that the actual operating profit margin in the second half of the year only saw a slight decline, 'far less significant than reported'. After excluding the aforementioned non-operating factors, overall revenue and profit still achieved growth. 他表示，实际下半年经营利润率仅小幅下滑，「远没有报道中这么大幅度」，剔除上述非经营性因素后，总体营收和利润仍实现增长。

item.title: 特斯拉中国：目前并无在上海超级工厂量产机器人的具体计划
item.guid: 特斯拉中国：目前并无在上海超级工厂量产机器人的具体计划
item.description:
According to Securities Times, yesterday, Tesla China responded to online rumors that 'Tesla is about to mass-produce robots in Shanghai,' explicitly stating that the claim was a misinterpretation. 据《证券时报》报道，昨天，特斯拉中国方面对网络流传「特斯拉即将在上海量产机器人」的消息发表回应，明确表示该说法系误读。

Currently, Tesla has no specific plans to mass-produce robots at its Shanghai Gigafactory. Please do not describe it in reports as Tesla being about to mass-produce robots in Shanghai; this is incorrect information.

It is reported that on April 14, when Tesla Vice President Wang Hao was asked about robot-related issues at a media event, he only discussed the Shanghai Gigafactory's good mass production capabilities and its significant future potential, without making any specific commitments regarding robot mass production. 据报道，4 月 14 日，特斯拉副总裁王昊在一场媒体活动中被问及机器人相关问题时，仅就上海超级工厂具备良好的规模化量产能力、未来拥有较大潜力进行了探讨，并未就机器人量产作出任何具体承诺。

It is understood that Tesla's third-generation humanoid robot is planned for release by the end of 2026. The Fremont factory is converting the Model S/X production line into a production line for the humanoid robot Optimus, with a final planned annual capacity of one million units. 据悉，特斯拉第三代人形机器人计划于 2026 年底发布，弗里蒙特工厂正在将 Model S/X 产线改造为人形机器人 Optimus 的产线，最终规划年产能百万台。

item.title: 追觅俞浩：手机要和华为、小米三分天下，但我现在还没法告诉你怎么做
item.guid: 追觅俞浩：手机要和华为、小米三分天下，但我现在还没法告诉你怎么做
item.description:
According to LatePost, Yu Hao, founder of Dreame Technology, underwent a six-and-a-half-hour in-depth interview yesterday. Regarding his previous public statement that Dreame phones would 'divide the market into three' with Huawei and Xiaomi in the future, Yu Hao said that Dreame originally did not intend to disclose its phone business, but 'it couldn't be hidden anymore'. 据《晚点 LatePost》报道，追觅科技创始人俞浩昨日接受了一次长达六个半小时的深度专访。对于此前他公开宣称追觅手机未来要与华为、小米「三分天下」的发言，俞浩表示，追觅本来不打算对外披露手机业务，但「藏不住了」。

We originally didn't plan to say anything, but we couldn't hide it anymore. When the automotive team reached 800 people and the phone team also had several hundred, there were many rumors outside, and rumors can lead to many misunderstandings.

As for how to achieve this 'division into three,' he did not provide a clear path but rather incorporated it into Dreame's consistent methodological framework: 至于如何实现三分天下，他并未给出清晰路径，而是将其纳入追觅一贯的方法论框架：

From point A to point B, constantly testing and receiving feedback to correct the route. In today's increasingly international and diverse technological innovation landscape, this method might be better. If you ask me to tell you how to do it on the first day of departure, I cannot.

Beyond phones, Yu Hao also revealed plans for car manufacturing, also targeting the high-end market, with the goal of creating the 'fastest pure electric car,' priced higher than Tesla. 在手机之外，俞浩同步透露了造车计划，同样剑指高端，目标是造出「速度最快的纯电车」，且定价将高于特斯拉。

Yu Hao also revealed that Dreame has maintained an average revenue growth rate of 100% for 8 consecutive years since its establishment, and its global net profit margin exceeded 20% in the most recent quarter, with its main business continuously profitable. He believes this is the fundamental confidence supporting multi-line expansion. 俞浩还透露，追觅自成立以来连续 8 年保持平均 100% 的收入增速，最近一季度全球净利润率已超 20%，主营业务持续盈利，他认为这是支撑多线扩张的根本底气。

item.title: 下一代徕卡相机将搭载国产定制 CMOS 传感器
item.guid: 下一代徕卡相机将搭载国产定制-CMOS-传感器
item.description:
Chinese CMOS image sensor supplier Gpixel yesterday officially announced a strategic partnership with Leica. The two parties will jointly customize and develop a high-performance CMOS image sensor chip for the next generation of Leica cameras. 国产 CMOS 图像传感器供应商长光辰芯（Gpixel）昨日与徕卡正式宣布战略合作，双方将联合为下一代徕卡相机定制开发一款高性能 CMOS 图像传感器芯片。

It is understood that this collaboration will integrate Leica's years of accumulated expertise in high-end imaging with Gpixel's leading CMOS image sensor design capabilities to create customized chips that precisely meet Leica cameras' stringent standards for color reproduction, noise optimization, dynamic range, and detail rendering. 据悉，此次合作将整合徕卡在高端成像领域积累多年的专业经验，与长光辰芯领先的 CMOS 图像传感器设计能力，打造定制化芯片，精准匹配徕卡相机在色彩还原、噪声优化、动态范围及细节呈现上的严苛标准。

The two parties will also collaborate closely on chip verification, image tuning, and mass production preparation, covering the entire chain from R&D to mass production. Engineering and technical teams from Wetzlar, Germany, Antwerp, Belgium, and Changchun, China, will participate. 双方还将在芯片验证、图像调校及量产准备等方面密切协作，覆盖从研发到量产的完整链条。来自德国韦茨拉尔、比利时安特卫普和中国长春三地的工程技术团队将参与其中。

item.title: 福特 CEO：选择试驾小米 SU7 是因为特斯拉「没有更新的车型」
item.guid: 福特-CEO：选择试驾小米-SU7-是因为特斯拉「没有更新的车型」
item.description:
Recently, Ford CEO Jim Farley explained on the podcast 'Rapid Response' why he chose to drive a Xiaomi SU7 instead of a Tesla in 2024 to understand market competition. 近日，福特 CEO Jim Farley 在播客节目《Rapid Response》中解释了为何在 2024 年选择驾驶小米 SU7 而非特斯拉来了解市场竞争。

Farley responded that if one wants to compete head-on with Chinese automakers in the automotive sector, the focus is not necessarily on Tesla. 法利回应称，若要在汽车领域与中国车企正面竞争，焦点并不一定落在特斯拉身上。

This is not directed at Tesla. They perform well, it's just that they don't have updated models currently.

Farley believes that Chinese automakers, represented by BYD, have significant advantages in cost control, supply chain management, and manufacturing capabilities, making them 'the strongest in the industry'. He stated that if Ford could learn from BYD's cost competitiveness and apply it to its own more familiar market segments, it would likely gain an advantage in the next round of competition. 法利认为，以比亚迪为代表的中国车企在成本控制、供应链管理和制造能力上具备显著优势，堪称「业界最强」。他表示，福特若能借鉴比亚迪的成本竞争力，并将其应用于自身更熟悉的细分市场，便有望在下一轮竞争中占据优势。

He also pointed out that the next phase of electric vehicle consumers in the US still prefer models like pickup trucks and SUVs, but price expectations have dropped from an early $50,000 to around $30,000, with 'affordability' becoming a core demand. 他还指出，美国下一阶段的电动汽车消费者依然青睐皮卡和 SUV 等车型，但价格预期已从早期的 5 万美元降至 3 万美元左右，「可负担性」成为核心诉求。

Earlier, he revealed in a podcast that he had continuously driven a Xiaomi SU7 for half a year in 2024 and was unwilling to change vehicles. In early April this year, he directly warned on the "Fox & Friends" program that once Chinese cars enter the U.S. market on a large scale, they will cause "devastating" impact on American manufacturing. 更早前，他曾在播客中透露，自己在 2024 年连续驾驶小米 SU7 长达半年，且不愿更换车辆。今年 4 月初，他在《Fox & Friends》节目中更直接示警，称中国汽车一旦大规模进入美国市场，将对美国制造业造成「毁灭性」冲击。

item.title: 中国人形机器人出货量占全球超八成
item.guid: 中国人形机器人出货量占全球超八成
item.description:
According to CCTV.com, China's humanoid robot shipments have accounted for over 80% of the global share, and robots are becoming a new label for China's foreign trade. 据央视网报道，中国人形机器人出货量已占全球超八成份额，机器人正成为中国外贸的新标签。

While the domestic robotics industry continues to boom, domestically produced robots are accelerating their expansion overseas, with export volumes maintaining rapid growth. Data from the General Administration of Customs shows that in the first quarter of this year, China's export value of mechanical and electrical products reached 4.34 trillion yuan, accounting for over 60% of the total export value. 在国内机器人产业持续爆发的同时，国产机器人正加速出海，出口规模持续高速增长。海关总署数据显示，今年一季度，中国机电产品出口额达 4.34 万亿元，占出口总值的六成以上。

Among them, as a representative of new quality productive forces and an important carrier of future industries, various types of "robots" produced in China have been exported to over 140 countries and regions worldwide. 其中，作为新质生产力代表与未来产业重要载体，中国生产的各类「机器人」已出口至全球 140 多个国家和地区。

item.title: 灵光 App 砸 1 亿元启动创作者激励计划
item.guid: 灵光-App-砸-1-亿元启动创作者激励计划
item.description:
Ant Lingguang App officially announced yesterday the launch of the "Lingguang Flash Application Creator Incentive Program," investing a special fund of 100 million yuan to support high-quality flash applications and excellent creators on the platform. 蚂蚁灵光 App 昨日正式宣布启动「灵光闪应用创作者激励计划」，投入 1 亿元专项基金，面向平台上的优质闪应用与优秀创作者提供扶持。

According to the program rules, up to 1 million yuan will incentivize 10,000 high-quality flash applications daily, and up to 1 million yuan will incentivize 100 excellent creators weekly. Users can participate in the selection by generating and publishing flash applications to Lingguang Circle within the Lingguang App. 根据计划规则，每天最高 100 万元激励 10000 个优质闪应用，每周最高 100 万元激励 100 名优秀创作者。用户在灵光 App 生成闪应用并发布至灵光圈，即可参与评选。

Along with the incentive program, a new feature called "Lingguang Circle" has been launched, which is a content carrier specifically designed for the flash application ecosystem. In Lingguang Circle, personally created flash applications can be shared, liked, and re-created. 伴随激励计划同步推出的，还有全新功能「灵光圈」，这是一个专为闪应用生态设计的内容载体。在灵光圈中，个人创作的闪应用可被分享、点赞与二次创作。

🔗 Related Reading: What if applications could spread like Moments? 🔗 相关阅读： 假如应用也可以像朋友圈一样传播？

item.title: 💡 这家公司把面试约在周日，求职者：太省心了
item.guid: 💡-这家公司把面试约在周日，求职者：太省心了
item.description:
According to Business Insider, as AI makes it increasingly easy to inflate resumes, more and more employers are introducing "work trial" mechanisms, requiring job seekers to complete real projects or on-site trials before formal employment to verify their actual abilities. 据《商业内幕》报道，随着人工智能使简历注水愈发容易，越来越多的雇主开始引入「试工考查」（work trial）机制，要求求职者在正式录用前完成真实项目或到岗试工，以验证其实际能力。

However, this trend also brings new pressure to employed job seekers – they often have to take time off to participate in these longer recruitment processes. 然而，这一趋势也给在职求职者带来了新的压力——他们往往不得不请假，才能参与这些耗时更长的招聘流程。

Facing this dilemma, the startup legal services company Crosby offered its solution: scheduling interviews on Sundays. Crosby CEO Ryan Daniels stated that this arrangement initially made him worry about resistance from job seekers, but many candidates actually felt relieved. 面对这一矛盾，初创法律服务公司 Crosby 给出了自己的解法：把面试安排在周日。Crosby CEO Ryan Daniels 表示，这一安排最初让他担心会引发求职者的抵触，但许多候选人反而如释重负。

Many people would even say, "This is really too convenient."

Sunday interviews allow employed job seekers to avoid using their annual leave, and also align with the work habits of company executives, who often handle affairs on Sundays anyway, and whose calendars are relatively free on that day, allowing more time for in-depth participation in interviews. 周日面试让在职求职者无需动用年假，同时也符合公司高管的工作习惯，因为他们本就常在周日处理事务，且当天日历相对空闲，反而有更多时间深度参与面试。

In terms of specific format, Crosby adopts differentiated assessment methods for different positions. Software engineer candidates are directly put into real projects, assessing not only their coding ability itself but also how they use AI-assisted tools in actual work; business position candidates participate in group interviews with the executive team. 在具体形式上，Crosby 对不同岗位采取差异化的考察方式。软件工程师候选人会被直接投入真实项目，考察的不仅是编码能力本身，还包括其在实际工作中使用 AI 辅助工具的方式；商业岗位候选人则参与高管团队的小组面试。

After the interview, candidates also have lunch or dinner with the team to mutually assess cultural fit. Daniels believes this step is crucial for attracting quality candidates: "If they click with the team, we definitely won't miss them." 面试结束后，候选人还会与团队共进午餐或晚餐，以双向评估文化契合度。Daniels 认为这一环节对吸引优质候选人至关重要：「如果他们和团队合拍，我们肯定不会错过他们。」

item.title: Kimi K2.6 发布并开源
item.guid: Kimi-K2.6-发布并开源
item.description:
Yesterday, Moonshot AI officially released and open-sourced its new model Kimi K2.6, with key upgrades to its coding, AI agent, and office capabilities. 昨天，月之暗面正式发布并开源了新模型 Kimi K2.6，重点升级了代码、AI 智能体和办公能力。

  • Stronger coding capabilities: Internal benchmark test scores improved by approximately 20%, capable of uninterrupted coding for 13 hours, processing over 4000 lines of code, and supporting multiple languages such as Rust, Go, and Python; 代码能力更强：内部基准测试得分提升约 20%，可不间断编码 13 小时、处理超 4000 行代码，支持 Rust、Go、Python 等多种语言；
  • AI agent cluster expansion: Supports up to 300 sub-AI agents working in parallel, completing 4000 steps, with significantly improved task completion quality; AI 智能体集群扩容：最多支持 300 个子 AI 智能体并行协作，完成 4000 个步骤，任务完成质量显著提升；
  • Long-term autonomous operation: Under frameworks like OpenClaw and Hermes Agent, it supports continuous 5-day autonomous operation without human intervention; 长时自主运行：在 OpenClaw、Hermes Agent 等框架下，支持连续 5 天无人干预自主运行；
  • Upgraded design capabilities: Can generate web pages and web applications with better visual effects, significantly outperforming Gemini 3 in front-end design evaluations; 设计能力升级：能生成视觉效果更好的网页和 Web 应用，前端设计评测中明显优于 Gemini 3；

    • New Skill feature: supports "Office document to skill" conversion, with hundreds of officially recommended skills built into the system.

In industry benchmark tests, K2.6's performance on evaluations such as SWE-Bench Pro and Humanity’s Last Exam is on par with or superior to closed-source models like GPT-5.4, Claude Opus 4.6, and Gemini 3.1 Pro. 在行业基准测试中，K2.6 在 SWE-Bench Pro、Humanity’s Last Exam 等评测上的成绩持平或优于 GPT-5.4、Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 3.1 Pro 等闭源模型。

This release also announced a small-scale internal test for the "Claw Group" feature, allowing humans to collaborate with multiple AI agents within the same group, with initial support for OpenClaw framework integration. 此次发布还预告了「Claw 群组」功能的小范围内测，允许人类与多个 AI 智能体在同一群组内协作，首批支持 OpenClaw 框架接入。

🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/moonshotai 🤗 Hugging Face: huggingface.co/moonshotai

👾 ModelScope: modelscope.ai/organization/moonshotai 👾 ModelScope: modelscope.ai/organization/moonshotai

item.title: 影石 Luna Ultra 上手曝光：徕卡双摄、1 英寸传感器、14 档动态范围
item.guid: 影石-Luna-Ultra-上手曝光：徕卡双摄、1-英寸传感器、14-档动态范围
item.description:
Recently, blogger David Manning got an early hands-on with Insta360's upcoming dual-camera handheld gimbal camera, Luna Ultra, and revealed five key parameters. 近日，博主 David Manning 抢先上手了影石即将发布的双摄手持云台相机 Luna Ultra，并透露了五项关键参数。

    The lens was jointly developed by Insta360 and Leica;

    The body features a dual-camera design, supporting multiple focal length switches, with specific focal length values not yet announced;

    Equipped with a 1-inch sensor, F1.8 aperture, dynamic range of 14 ~ 15 stops, and supports 10-bit video recording;

    Manning also hinted at "another innovation" on the front of the camera body in the video, but it cannot be disclosed yet.

Luna Ultra has previously been confirmed to debut at the NAB 2026 exhibition, held from April 19th to 22nd this year. Insta360 CEO Liu Jingkang publicly stated at the company's annual meeting in February this year that Luna would be officially released in the first half of this year, emphasizing that it "is definitely not another Pocket." Luna Ultra 此前已确认将在今年 4 月 19 日至 22 日举行的 NAB 2026 展会上亮相。影石 CEO 刘靖康今年 2 月曾在公司年会上公开表示，Luna 将于今年上半年正式发布，并强调其「绝不是另一个 Pocket」。

item.title: 42.8 万元起，全新坦克 700 正式上市
item.guid: 42.8-万元起，全新坦克-700-正式上市
item.description:
Yesterday, the all-new Tank 700 was officially launched, with a starting price of 428,000 yuan. 昨日，全新坦克 700 正式上市，起售价 42.8 万元。

In terms of exterior design, the all-new Tank 700 continues the narrative of Oriental aesthetics, introducing the world's first mechanical rotating and opening laser headlights "Rui Lin's Eye," and the industry's first exclusive hard-core off-road vehicle rear wing "Xiang Lin's Flame Tail," with a 6-light layout at the rear; the new color "Dunhuang Green" is inspired by the original lapis lazuli color of Dunhuang murals. 外观设计上，全新坦克 700 延续东方美学叙事，推出全球首创机械旋转开合式激光大灯「瑞麟之眼」，以及行业首创硬派越野车专属尾翼「祥麟焰尾」，尾部采用 6 灯布局；新增配色「敦煌青」取色自敦煌壁画青金石原色。

    In terms of power, the standard version is equipped with the Hi4-Z super electric-hybrid architecture for all-terrain off-roading, featuring the world's first power split technology; the peak version is equipped with a self-developed 3.0T twin-turbo hybrid engine;

    All models come standard with ventilated/heated/massaging "Fiber Cloud" seats, a 21-speaker 7.1.4 Dolby Atmos sound system, a 5.4L smart hot/cold refrigerator, and a 17.3-inch 3K rear ceiling screen;

    Equipped with the VLA large model and Coffee Pilot 4.0, supporting colloquial commands.

Also released is "Qilin Hui," positioned as a high-end user community, with the first batch opening 5 interest circles including equestrianism, sea fishing, photography, and business, and launching the "Top 100 Curators" program to provide members with niche secret routes and exclusive guide services. 同时发布的还有「麒麟荟」，定位高端用户社群，首批开放马术、海钓、摄影、商业共 5 个兴趣圈层，并推出「百大主理人」计划，为会员提供小众秘境路线与专属领队服务。

item.title: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview 上线
item.guid: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview-上线
item.description:
Yesterday, the Qwen team released an early preview of its flagship model, Qwen3.6-Max-Preview. As the next-generation successor to Qwen3.6-Plus, the new model has achieved significant improvements across three major dimensions: agent programming, world knowledge, and instruction following. 昨天，千问团队发布了旗舰模型的早期预览版 Qwen3.6-Max-Preview，作为 Qwen3.6-Plus 的下一代继任者，新模型在智能体编程、世界知识与指令遵循三大维度上均取得显著提升。

    SkillsBench improved by 9.9 points, SciCode by 10.8 points, NL2Repo by 5.0 points, and Terminal-Bench 2.0 by 3.8 points;

    In terms of knowledge capabilities, SuperGPQA improved by 2.3 points, and QwenChineseBench by 5.3 points;

    In terms of instruction following, ToolcallFormatIFBench improved by 2.8 points.

Officially, the model achieved the highest scores on six major programming benchmarks: SWE-bench Pro, Terminal-Bench 2.0, SkillsBench, QwenClawBench, QwenWebBench, and SciCode. 官方称，该模型在 SWE-bench Pro、Terminal-Bench 2.0、SkillsBench、QwenClawBench、QwenWebBench 和 SciCode 六项主要编程基准上均取得最高分。

According to Yicai, Alibaba ATH announced yesterday that its AI video generation project, HappyHorse-1.0, will gradually open API testing through the Alibaba Cloud Bailian platform on April 27, with the first batch of invited testers being enterprise-level customers. 另据第一财经，阿里 ATH 昨日宣布，旗下 AI 视频生成项目 HappyHorse-1.0 将于 4 月 27 日通过阿里云百炼平台逐步开放 API 测试，首批邀测对象为企业级客户。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Qwen's strongest model was released, topping the list of domestic best 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，千问最强模型发布，登顶国产最佳

item.title: 阿里发布语音识别大模型 Fun-ASR1.5
item.guid: 阿里发布语音识别大模型-Fun-ASR1.5
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba released the new generation end-to-end speech recognition large model Fun-ASR 1.5, covering 30 languages including Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, French, and German with a single model. It adopts an MoE (Mixture of Experts) architecture at its core and achieved SOTA results in multiple open-source multilingual test sets. 昨天，阿里巴巴发布新一代端到端语音识别大模型 Fun-ASR 1.5，以单一模型覆盖中、英、日、韩、法、德等 30 种语言，底层采用 MoE（混合专家）架构，在多个开源多语言测试集中取得 SOTA 成绩。

For Chinese dialects, the model was trained on hundreds of thousands of hours of real speech data, with an average character error rate (CER) reduced by 56.2% compared to the previous version. It covers seven major dialect systems including Cantonese, Minnan, Hakka, and Shanghainese, and adds specialized recognition for ancient poetry, achieving a character-level accuracy of 97% in internal evaluations. 中文方言方面，模型基于数十万小时真实语音数据训练，平均字错误率（CER）较上一版本下降 56.2%，覆盖粤语、闽南话、客家话、上海话等七大方言体系，并新增古诗词专项识别，内部评测字符级准确率达 97%。

Additionally, the model can automatically insert punctuation and normalize spoken expressions into standard formats, such as converting "五万八千块" to "58000 元", significantly reducing manual proofreading costs in scenarios like meeting minutes and legal transcripts. 此外，模型可自动插入标点并将口语表达归一化为规范格式，如将「五万八千块」转换为「58000 元」，大幅减少会议纪要、法律笔录等场景的人工校对成本。

item.title: 猛士汽车联合华为乾崑发布智能越野新架构
item.guid: 猛士汽车联合华为乾崑发布智能越野新架构
item.description:
Mengshi Motors held its Spring Renewal Conference yesterday, announcing that its cooperation with Huawei Qiankun has upgraded from "product co-creation" to "deep empowerment," and jointly released several new technologies for intelligent off-road scenarios. 猛士汽车昨日举办春季焕新发布会，宣布与华为乾崑的合作从「产品共创」升级为「深度赋能」，并联合发布多项面向智能越野场景的新技术。

The two parties launched a new intelligent off-road architecture, equipped with the industry's first 896-line lidar, adopting a "dual optical path" design. Officially, it can stably detect obstacles 14 cm high at a distance of 120 meters, and road surface perception accuracy has been improved to over 95%. 双方推出全新智能越野架构，搭载行业首发的 896 线激光雷达，采用「双光路」设计，官方称可稳定探测 120 米外、14 厘米高的障碍物，路面感知精度提升至 95% 以上。

Regarding the chassis, the Rock Chassis 2.0 introduces the Huawei Qiankun XMC digital chassis engine; in terms of power, the Extreme Power 2.0 boasts a nominal comprehensive range of 1450km, 0-100km/h acceleration in the 4-second range, and supports 6C fast charging. The "Whale Fin" communication system supports dual-network dual-standby, with official claims of signal strength 60% higher than the industry average. 底盘方面，磐石底盘 2.0 引入华为乾崑 XMC 数字底盘引擎；动力方面，极猛动力 2.0 综合续航标称达 1450km，零百加速进入 4s 级，支持 6C 快充。通信系统「鲸鳍」支持双网双待，官方称信号强度高于业界 60%。

Mengshi Motors stated that it will implement the aforementioned technologies in more than 4 new models within the next two years, and plans to expand its off-road ecological bases to 100 by next year. 猛士汽车表示，未来两年将把上述技术落地至 4 款以上新车型，越野生态基地计划明年扩展至 100 家。

item.title: 格力就「真铜实料」发声：停产工程机不代表家用机减配
item.guid: 格力就「真铜实料」发声：停产工程机不代表家用机减配
item.description:
According to Sina Tech, Gree Electric Appliances yesterday issued an industry promotion and standard initiative statement, and publicly responded to the online dispute with Hisense Air Conditioning regarding "true copper and real materials." 据新浪科技报道，格力电器昨日发布行业宣传与标准倡议声明，并就与海信空调「真铜实料」网络争端作出公开回应。

Gree pointed out in its statement that "true copper and real materials" is a clear standard and original proposition put forward by Gree based on its commitment to product quality. Gree believes that Hisense's use of this expression in its promotions, along with the slogan "Good Air Made by Hisense," is highly similar to Gree's classic slogan "Good Air Conditioners Made by Gree." 格力在声明中指出，「真铜实料」系格力基于产品品质坚守提出的明确标准与原创主张。格力认为，海信在宣传中使用该表述，且推出「好空气海信造」的广告语，与格力经典口号「好空调格力造」高度近似。

In response to online rumors questioning "some Gree models use aluminum wire motors," Gree Electric Appliances clarified: the models involved are 5-horsepower commercial engineering ducted units and 5-horsepower commercial ceiling cassette units, which are specialized custom small-batch engineering machines, not household retail models for ordinary consumers, and these products have long been completely discontinued. 针对网络流传的「格力部分机型采用铝线电机」的质疑，格力电器作出澄清：涉及机型为 5 匹商用工程风管机组及 5 匹商铺工程天井机，属于专项定制小批量工程机，并非面向普通消费者的家用零售机型，且上述产品早已全面停产。

Gree further emphasized that the company implements unified strict standards for all domestic retail household air conditioners: all household models use true copper and real materials for both heat exchangers and motors, with motors 100% using all-copper wires, "absolutely no aluminum substitution for copper, and absolutely no reduction in configuration or quality." 格力进一步强调，公司对国内全渠道家用零售空调执行统一严苛标准：全系家用机型两器两机真铜实料，电机 100% 采用全铜线，「绝不以铝代铜、绝不减配降质」。

Gree advocates for the industry to return to the essence of products, promote transparency in materials used for consumer market terminal products, and disclose the materials of the four core components: condenser, evaporator, compressor, and motor. 格力倡议行业回归产品本质，推动消费市场终端产品用料透明化，公开冷凝器、蒸发器、压缩机、电机四大核心部件材质。

item.title: 贾国龙焖面上海三店开业、关联公司完成更名
item.guid: 贾国龙焖面上海三店开业、关联公司完成更名
item.description:
According to Red Star Capital Bureau, Xibei founder Jia Guolong's new brand "Tianbian Claypot Braised Noodles" simultaneously opened three stores in Shanghai yesterday, located in Jing'an, Pudong, and Jiading. The Pudong Dongfang Road store is the largest in Shanghai, with a building area of over 2,400 square meters and 350 seats. 据红星资本局报道，西贝创始人贾国龙旗下新品牌「天边砂锅焖面」昨日在上海三店同步开业，门店分别落址静安、浦东和嘉定。其中浦东东方路门店为上海面积最大门店，建筑面积达 2400 余平方米，共设 350 个餐位。

The brand primarily features claypot braised noodles, a specialty from Jia Guolong's hometown of Bayannur, Inner Mongolia. Its core categories include claypot braised noodles and claypot soup noodles, complemented by side dishes such as braised delights, claypot dishes, and cold dishes, with an average per capita spending of about 50 yuan. 该品牌主打贾国龙家乡内蒙古巴盟特色砂锅焖面，核心品类涵盖砂锅焖面与砂锅汤面，并搭配卤味、砂锅菜、凉菜等辅助菜品，人均消费约 50 元。

Additionally, business registration information shows that Beijing Jia Guolong Air Bun Catering Management Co., Ltd. recently completed a business change, with its company name changed to Tianbian Brand Management (Beijing) Co., Ltd., and its legal representative changed from Fu Guo to Li Zhihong; 另外，工商信息显示，北京贾国龙空气馍餐饮管理有限公司近日已完成工商变更，企业名称更名为天边品牌管理（北京）有限公司，同时法定代表人由付国变更为李志宏；

Inner Mongolia Xiyue Fendou Catering Co., Ltd. was recently established, with Qin Yongjun as its legal representative. It is jointly held by Tianbian Brand Management (Beijing) Co., Ltd. and Qin Yongjun, and its business scope covers catering services, food business management, and alcoholic beverage sales. 内蒙古喜悦奋斗餐饮有限责任公司近日成立，法定代表人为秦勇军，由天边品牌管理（北京）有限公司与秦勇军共同持股，经营范围涵盖餐饮服务、食品经营管理及酒类经营等。

Jia Guolong previously revealed that one of the core purposes of launching a new brand was to take over some of Xibei's idle stores and employees. 贾国龙此前曾透露，推出新品牌的核心目的之一，是承接西贝部分闲置门店及员工。

item.title: 多平台回应 12306 拒绝出票
item.guid: 多平台回应-12306-拒绝出票
item.description:
According to a report by China Newsweek, during the peak period of ticket purchases for the "May Day" holiday, the 12306 platform initiated a risk control upgrade, leading to abnormal fluctuations in the train ticket issuance functions of multiple third-party business travel platforms. 据中新经纬报道，「五一」假期购票高峰期间，12306 平台启动风控升级，多个第三方商旅平台的火车票出票功能出现异常波动。

Customer service for Tongcheng Business Travel, Ctrip Business Travel, and Didi Enterprise Edition all confirmed that due to the 12306 risk control upgrade and the May Day booking peak, the train ticket issuance system experienced abnormal fluctuations or delays, and all platforms stated they are currently working on repairs. 同程商旅、携程商旅、滴滴企业版客服均确认，受 12306 风控升级及五一预订高峰期影响，火车票出票系统存在异常波动或延迟，各平台均表示正在修复中。

Among them, Ctrip Business Travel's manual customer service explicitly stated that the train ticket standby queuing and snatching function is no longer available. "Business has piled up significantly in the past two days, and technical staff are currently working on repairs," and when the function will be restored still awaits notification. 其中，携程商旅人工客服明确表示，火车票候补抢票功能已无法使用，「这两天业务堆积比较严重，目前技术人员正在修复中」，功能何时恢复仍需等待通知。

However, manual customer service for individual users on Ctrip, Fliggy, and Qunar.com all stated that the standby queuing and snatching function is still available for normal use. 而携程、飞猪、去哪儿网的面向个人用户的人工客服则均表示，候补抢票功能仍可正常使用。

item.title: 爱奇艺发布百名 AI 艺人库，多位被点名演员：没签过任何 AI 授权
item.guid: 爱奇艺发布百名-AI-艺人库，多位被点名演员：没签过任何-AI-授权
item.description:
According to a report by Jiangnan Metropolis Daily, the 2026 iQIYI World Conference officially took place yesterday. At the conference, iQIYI CEO Gong Yu unveiled the AI Artist Database plan, announcing that over 100 artists have already joined the platform's AI artist database. 据江南都市报报道，2026 爱奇艺世界大会昨天正式举行。会上，爱奇艺 CEO 龚宇发布 AI 艺人库计划，宣布已有逾 100 名艺人入驻该平台的 AI 艺人库。

On-site video showed Yu Hewei, Zhang Ruoyun, Ma Su, Chen Zheyuan, Zeng Shunxi, Cheng Lei, Wang Churan, Director Fang, Jiang Long, and others were named as being included. 现场视频显示，于和伟、张若昀、马苏、陈哲远、曾舜晞、丞磊、王楚然、房主任、蒋龙等人被点名列入其中。

In his speech, Gong Yu stated that AI can help actors have "more of their own time," and said, "Actors often work very hard, filming for three or four months with no personal life. AI can also allow actors to go from acting in 4 dramas a year to 14 dramas, giving everyone more time to rest." 龚宇在发言中表示，AI 能帮助演员拥有「更多自己的时间」，并称「演员常常工作很辛苦，三四个月在拍戏，没有自己的生活，AI 也能让演员从一年演 4 部戏到 14 部戏，让大家有更多的时间休息。」

However, several named artists subsequently spoke out to deny it. Zhang Ruoyun, Wang Churan, Li Yitong, and Yu Hewei's teams all stated that they had never signed any AI-related authorization agreements. The clear discrepancy between the official announcement and the statements from the individuals involved plunged the launch event into public controversy. 然而，多位被点名艺人随后相继发声否认。张若昀、王楚然、李一桐、于和伟方面均表示，从未签署过任何 AI 相关授权协议。官宣与当事人声明之间的明显出入，令此次发布活动陷入舆论风波。

In response to the related controversy, iQIYI subsequently issued a statement. The statement pointed out that the original intention of establishing the Nadou Pro Artist Database was to provide a standardized platform for AIGC creators, facilitating their selection of artists during creation and enabling efficient communication of cooperation details between iQIYI and the artists. 针对相关争议，爱奇艺随后发布声明回应。声明指出，纳逗 Pro 艺人库的建立初衷，是为 AIGC 创作者提供规范平台，便于其在创作中遴选艺人，并通过爱奇艺与艺人方高效沟通合作细节。

iQIYI emphasized that joining the artist database only represents an artist's "willingness to engage with AI film and television projects," but whether they participate in specific projects or play specific roles requires separate negotiation and authorization. "This process is consistent with the traditional cooperation process for live-action film and television projects." 爱奇艺强调，入驻艺人库仅代表艺人「有接洽 AI 影视项目的意愿」，但是否参与具体项目、是否出演具体角色，均需进行单独商谈和授权，「这一流程与传统的真人影视项目合作流程是一致的」。

item.title: 《艾尔登法环》真人电影官宣，预定 2028 年上映
item.guid: 《艾尔登法环》真人电影官宣，预定-2028-年上映
item.description:
Yesterday, Bandai Namco Entertainment announced that the live-action film adaptation of the popular game "Elden Ring" has officially set its release date, planned for March 3, 2028, in North America in IMAX format, with filming to begin this spring. 昨天，万代南梦宫娱乐宣布，热门游戏《艾尔登法环》改编真人电影正式宣布定档，计划于 2028 年 3 月 3 日在北美以 IMAX 格式上映，今年春季开机拍摄。

The film is co-produced by A24 Films and Bandai Namco Entertainment, directed and written by Alex Garland, whose representative works include "Annihilation," "Ex Machina," and "Civil War." George R.R. Martin, the original author of the game, will serve as one of the producers. 本片由 A24 影业与万代南梦宫娱乐联合出品，执导兼编剧为亚历克斯·加兰——其代表作包括《湮灭》《机械姬》及《美国内战》。游戏原著作者乔治·R·R·马丁将担任制作人之一。

item.title: 「万达影城」品牌不改名
item.guid: 「万达影城」品牌不改名
item.description:
Yesterday, after Wanda Films officially changed its name to "Ruyi Film Entertainment Co., Ltd.," the company's Chairwoman and President, Chen Zhixi, issued an all-staff letter clarifying the logic behind the renaming: 昨天，在万达电影正式更名为「儒意电影娱乐股份有限公司」之后，公司董事长兼总裁陈祉希发布全员信，阐明更名逻辑：

"Ruyi" represents the company's inherent content creation gene, while "Film Entertainment" highlights the strategic determination to focus on offline scenarios and deeply cultivate diverse entertainment experiences.

It is worth noting that this renaming only applies to the listed company entity; its physical cinemas will continue to use the "Wanda Cinemas" brand, and new brands will be planned in the future based on market changes and user needs. 值得注意的是，此次更名仅针对上市公司主体，旗下实体影城将继续沿用「万达影城」品牌，未来会根据市场变化和用户需求规划新品牌。

At the strategic level, Chen Zhixi reviewed the transformation path since Ruyi's acquisition two years ago in her all-staff letter: the company has evolved from a pure exhibition terminal to an industry closed-loop of "content development—cinema exhibition—IP operation," and has introduced diverse content such as the Spring Festival Gala, F1, and League of Legends World Championship finals into cinemas. 在战略层面，陈祉希在全员信中回顾了儒意入主两年来的转型路径：公司已从单纯的放映终端，向「内容开发—院线放映—IP 运营」的行业闭环演进，并将春晚、F1、英雄联盟总决赛等多元内容引入影院。

Chen Zhixi stated that the company will leverage its more than 700 directly operated cinemas nationwide and its Ruyi-affiliated IP reserves to create "super scenarios" and "super IPs." 陈祉希称，公司将依托全国 700 多家直营影城及儒意系 IP 储备，打造「超级场景」与「超级 IP」。
